text:
- Update to 0.8.0
- Much work has been done in 0.8.0 to improve performance and reduce CPU load
- Patches required for previous versions have now been accepted upstream.
- Release notice: http://sourceforge.net/projects/bitcoin/files/Bitcoin/bitcoin-0.8.0/

Removed file(s):
- files/patch-qtipcserver-cpp
- files/patch-transactiondesc.cpp

Port maintainer (robbak@robbak.com) is cc'd.
